title: zephyranthes tepicensis
intro: Zephyranthes tepicensis, also known as the Mexican zephyr lily or Pink Rain Lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Amaryllidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Zephyranthes tepicensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
